name: Chicken Salad with Strawberry Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. For vinaigrette: In a food processor, mix strawberry slices, oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper until smooth. If not using immediately, cover and refrigerate.
2. Arrange lettuce on 4 dinner plates. Top each with chicken, berry halves, and cucumber. Drizzle with dressing and serve immediately.
